flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at South Carolina State University fell 18% between 2021 and 2024 (68.7% → 56.5%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at South Carolina State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (10.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at South Carolina State University rose 52% between 2021 and 2024 (13.9% → 21.1%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at South Carolina State University rose 42% between 2021 and 2024 (2.1k → 2.9k).
